productDisplayName: Fossil Men Black Dial Chronograph Watch FS4572
description: Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case, has a fixed bezel and a stainless steel backDial style: Black dial, has markings and three handsFeatures: Three-faced chronograph display, a screw to reset the time and two push buttons to adjust the alarm and timer, a date apertureStrap style: Black silicone strap secured with a tang claspWater-resistant up to 50 mComes in a signature Fossil collectible tinWarranty: 2 years against manufacturing defects from the date of purchaseWarranty provided by Brand Owner / Manufacturer
